Requires |- | [[Militia (Civ1)|Militia]] || 1 || 1 || 1 || style="text-align:center" | 10 || None |- | [[Phalanx (Civ1)|Phalanx]] || '''1''' || '''2''' || 1 || 20 || {{link|Bronze Working}} |- | [[Legion (Civ1)]] || 3 || 1 || 1 || 20 || [[Iron Working (Civ1)|Iron Working]]manual p.12 |} Trailing prose.
